heading: National Do-Not-Call Registry
label: 6151 National Do-Not-Call Registry

children.heading: Authority
children.label: a Authority
children.text: The Federal Trade Commission is authorized under to implement and enforce a national do-not-call registry.section 6102(a)(3)(A) of this title

children.heading: Ratification
children.label: b Ratification
children.text: The do-not-call registry provision of the Telemarketing Sales Rule (16 C.F.R. 310.4(b)(1)(iii)), which was promulgated by the Federal Trade Commission, effective , is ratified.March 31, 2003
